name: CriticalTaskScheduler
description: Task scheduler for Arduino with critical/background tasks. Cooperative task scheduling with a portable core (no String, no std::vector, no std::function), pluggable time source, per-task stats, optional FreeRTOS runner (auto-detected on ESP32, RP2040, nRF52; opt-in on STM32, Teensy, and others).
keywords: task, scheduler, cooperative, freertos, esp32, rp2040, nrf52, stm32, teensy, arduino, periodic, timer, non-blocking, real-time
